label: Healing wound without infection or dehiscence
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of healing wound or wound healing normally.
No infection, dehiscence/wound opening, bleeding problem, deep structure injury, high-risk wound context, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Wound infection, dehiscence, wound opening, uncontrolled bleeding, open fracture, tendon/nerve/vessel/bone concern, joint violation, bite wound, dirty wound, delayed high-risk presentation, severe pain, or neurovascular compromise.
Diabetic-foot risk, immunocompromise, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed wound plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up as instructed for wound check, suture or staple care, or scar/healing concerns.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports wound-healing education, keeping wounds clean/protected, following clinician dressing instructions, and escalation for increasing pain, redness, swelling, drainage, fever, or wound opening. Autonomous Phase 2101-2200 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-documented healing wound without infection, dehiscence, high-risk wound context, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of healing wound or wound healing normally
no infection, wound opening, deep structure injury, high-risk wound context, or specialist-directed plan documented
